auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Kraken.io API key used inside the auth.api_key request body. Find it in your Kraken.io account API Credentials page: https://kraken.io/account/api-credentials

extraFields.label: API Secret
extraFields.description: Kraken.io API secret paired with the API key in the auth.api_secret request body. Find it in your Kraken.io account API Credentials page: https://kraken.io/account/api-credentials

actions.name: get_user_status
actions.description: Fetch the current Kraken.io plan status and monthly optimization quota.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving Kraken.io account status.

active.description: Whether the Kraken.io account is currently active.

quotaTotal.description: The total monthly quota in bytes.

quotaUsed.description: The used monthly quota in bytes.

quotaRemaining.description: The remaining monthly quota in bytes.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Kraken.io account status payload.

actions.name: optimize_image
actions.description: Optimize one image with Kraken.io from either a public URL or direct upload, then store the result in local transit storage.

sourceUrl.description: The public URL of the source image to optimize.

contentBase64.description: The Base64-encoded source image bytes to upload.

fileName.description: The filename used for direct upload requests.

lossy.description: Whether Kraken.io should use lossy optimization instead of lossless optimization.

quality.description: The custom image quality level for JPG, PNG, and GIF output.

dev.description: Whether to enable Kraken.io sandbox mode for development testing.

autoOrient.description: Whether Kraken.io should automatically orient the image from EXIF data.

items.description: One metadata section to preserve in the optimized image.

preserveMeta.description: The metadata sections to preserve in the optimized file.

chromaSubsampling.description: The JPEG chroma subsampling mode requested for optimization.

strategy.description: The Kraken.io resize strategy to apply before optimization.

size.description: The output square size in pixels for the square strategy.

x.description: The crop origin x coordinate in pixels.

y.description: The crop origin y coordinate in pixels.

scale.description: The percentage used to scale the cropped area after applying the crop strategy.

cropMode.description: The gravity or direction used when cropping or fitting an image.

background.description: The fill background color in HEX, RGB, or RGBA notation.

enhance.description: Whether Kraken.io should enhance small resized images after resizing.

resize.description: Kraken.io resize settings for a single optimized output.

format.description: The output file format requested from Kraken.io.

background.description: The background color used when converting to a format that needs flattened transparency.

keepExtension.description: Whether Kraken.io should keep the original file extension after conversion.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for optimizing one image with Kraken.io.

fileName.description: The optimized filename returned by Kraken.io.

originalSize.description: The original file size in bytes.

optimizedSize.description: The optimized file size in bytes.

savedBytes.description: The number of bytes saved by Kraken.io.

originalWidth.description: The original image width in pixels.

originalHeight.description: The original image height in pixels.

krakedUrl.description: The temporary Kraken.io download URL returned by the optimization request.

contentType.description: The MIME type of the downloaded optimized file.

contentLength.description: The downloaded optimized file size in bytes.

name.description: The filename of the optimized file.

mimetype.description: The MIME type of the optimized file.

downloadUrl.description: The local transit download URL for the optimized file.

sizeBytes.description: The optimized file size in bytes.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the optimized file.

file.description: A downloadable optimized file stored in local transit storage.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for optimizing one image with Kraken.io.
